name: Crafty Vaporizer Cooling Unit
summary: This is a certified replacement cooling unit for the Crafty+ Vaporiser, manufactured by Storz & Bickel.
description: This is a certified replacement cooling unit for the Crafty+ Vaporiser, manufactured by Storz & Bickel. The unit is equipped with a swiveling mouthpiece for added convenience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
